chapters.zh: 耶稣到了，就知道拉撒路在坟墓里已经四天了。
chapters.en: Then when Jesus came, he found that he had in the grave four days already.

chapters.zh: 伯大尼离耶路撒冷不远，约有六里路。
chapters.en: Now Bethany was nigh unto Jerusalem, about fifteen furlongs off:

chapters.zh: 有好些犹太人来看马大和马利亚，要为他们的兄弟安慰他们。
chapters.en: And many of the Jews came to Martha and Mary, to comfort them concerning their brother.

chapters.zh: 马大听见耶稣来了，就出去迎接他；马利亚却仍然坐在家里。
chapters.en: Then Martha, as soon as she heard that Jesus was coming, went and met him: but Mary sat in the house.

chapters.zh: 马大对耶稣说：主阿，你若早在这里，我兄弟必不死。
chapters.en: Then said Martha unto Jesus, Lord, if thou hadst been here, my brother had not died.

chapters.zh: 就是现在，我也知道，你无论向神求甚么，神也必赐给你。
chapters.en: But I know, that even now, whatsoever thou wilt ask of God, God will give thee.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：你兄弟必然复活。
chapters.en: Jesus saith unto her, Thy brother shall rise again.

chapters.zh: 马大说：我知道在末日复活的时候，他必复活。
chapters.en: Martha saith unto him, I know that he shall rise again in the resurrection at the last day.

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他说：复活在我，生命也在我。信我的人虽然死了，也必复活，
chapters.en: Jesus said unto her, I am the resurrection, and the life: he that believeth in me, though he were dead, yet shall he live:

chapters.zh: 凡活著信我的人必永远不死。你信这话么？
chapters.en: And whosoever liveth and believeth in me shall never die. Believest thou this?

chapters.zh: 马大说：主阿，是的，我信你是基督，是神的儿子，就是那要临到世界的。
chapters.en: She saith unto him, Yea, Lord: I believe that thou art the Christ, the Son of God, which should come into the world.

chapters.zh: 马大说了这话，就回去暗暗的叫他妹子马利亚，说：夫子来了，叫你。
chapters.en: And when she had so said, she went her way, and called Mary her sister secretly, saying, The Master is come, and calleth for thee.

chapters.zh: 马利亚听见了，就急忙起来，到耶稣那里去。
chapters.en: As soon as she heard , she arose quickly, and came unto him.

chapters.zh: 那时，耶稣还没有进村子，仍在马大迎接他的地方。
chapters.en: Now Jesus was not yet come into the town, but was in that place where Martha met him.

chapters.zh: 那些同马利亚在家里安慰他的犹太人，见他急忙起来出去，就跟著他，以为他要往坟墓那里去哭。
chapters.en: The Jews then which were with her in the house, and comforted her, when they saw Mary, that she rose up hastily and went out, followed her, saying, She goeth unto the grave to weep there.

chapters.zh: 马利亚到了耶稣那里，看见他，就俯伏在他脚前，说：主阿，你若早在这里，我兄弟必不死。
chapters.en: Then when Mary was come where Jesus was, and saw him, she fell down at his feet, saying unto him, Lord, if thou hadst been here, my brother had not died.

chapters.zh: 耶稣看见他哭，并看见与他同来的犹太人也哭，就心里悲叹，又甚忧愁，
chapters.en: When Jesus therefore saw her weeping, and the Jews also weeping which came with her, he groaned in the spirit, and was troubled,

chapters.zh: 便说：你们把他安放在那里？他们回答说：请主来看。
chapters.en: And said, Where have ye laid him? They said unto him, Lord, come and see.

chapters.zh: 耶稣哭了。
chapters.en: Jesus wept.

chapters.zh: 犹太人就说：你看他爱这人是何等恳切。
chapters.en: Then said the Jews, Behold how he loved him!

chapters.zh: 其中有人说：他既然开了瞎子的眼睛，岂不能叫这人不死么？
chapters.en: And some of them said, Could not this man, which opened the eyes of the blind, have caused that even this man should not have died?

chapters.zh: 耶稣又心里悲叹，来到坟墓前；那坟墓是个洞，有一块石头挡著。
chapters.en: Jesus therefore again groaning in himself cometh to the grave. It was a cave, and a stone lay upon it.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：你们把石头挪开。那死人的姐姐马大对他说：主阿，他现在必是臭了，因为他死了已经四天了。
chapters.en: Jesus said, Take ye away the stone. Martha, the sister of him that was dead, saith unto him, Lord, by this time he stinketh: for he hath been four days.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：我不是对你说过，你若信，就必看见神的荣耀么？
chapters.en: Jesus saith unto her, Said I not unto thee, that, if thou wouldest believe, thou shouldest see the glory of God?

chapters.zh: 他们就把石头挪开。耶稣举目望天，说：父阿，我感谢你，因为你已经听我。
chapters.en: Then they took away the stone where the dead was laid. And Jesus lifted up eyes, and said, Father, I thank thee that thou hast heard me.

chapters.zh: 我也知道你常听我，但我说这话是为周围站著的众人，叫他们信是你差了我来。
chapters.en: And I knew that thou hearest me always: but because of the people which stand by I said , that they may believe that thou hast sent me.

chapters.zh: 说了这话，就大声呼叫说：拉撒路出来！
chapters.en: And when he thus had spoken, he cried with a loud voice, Lazarus, come forth.

chapters.zh: 那死人就出来了，手脚裹著布，脸上包著手巾。耶稣对他们说，解开，叫他走！
chapters.en: And he that was dead came forth, bound hand and foot with graveclothes: and his face was bound about with a napkin. Jesus saith unto them, Loose him, and let him go.

chapters.zh: 那些来看马利亚的犹太人见了耶稣所做的事，就多有信他的；
chapters.en: Then many of the Jews which came to Mary, and had seen the things which Jesus did, believed on him.

chapters.zh: 但其中也有去见法利赛人的，将耶稣所做的事告诉他们。
chapters.en: But some of them went their ways to the Pharisees, and told them what things Jesus had done.

chapters.zh: 祭司长和法利赛人聚集公会，说：这人行好些神迹，我们怎么办呢？
chapters.en: Then gathered the chief priests and the Pharisees a council, and said, What do we? for this man doeth many miracles.

chapters.zh: 若这样由著他，人人都要信他，罗马人也要来夺我们的地土和我们的百姓。
chapters.en: If we let him thus alone, all will believe on him: and the Romans shall come and take away both our place and nation.

chapters.zh: 内中有一个人，名叫该亚法，本年作大祭司，对他们说：你们不知道甚么。
chapters.en: And one of them, Caiaphas, being the high priest that same year, said unto them, Ye know nothing at all,

chapters.zh: 独不想一个人替百姓死，免得通国灭亡，就是你们的益处。
chapters.en: Nor consider that it is expedient for us, that one man should die for the people, and that the whole nation perish not.

chapters.zh: 他这话不是出于自己，是因他本年作大祭司，所以预言耶稣将要替这一国死；
chapters.en: And this spake he not of himself: but being high priest that year, he prophesied that Jesus should die for that nation;

chapters.zh: 也不但替这一国死，并要将神四散的子民都聚集归一。
chapters.en: And not for that nation only, but that also he should gather together in one the children of God that were scattered abroad.

chapters.zh: 从那日起，他们就商议要杀耶稣。
chapters.en: Then from that day forth they took counsel together for to put him to death.

chapters.zh: 所以，耶稣不再显然行在犹太人中间，就离开那里往靠近旷野的地方去，到了一座城，名叫以法莲，就在那里和门徒同住。
chapters.en: Jesus therefore walked no more openly among the Jews; but went thence unto a country near to the wilderness, into a city called Ephraim, and there continued with his disciples.

chapters.zh: 犹太人的逾越节近了，有许多人从乡下上耶路撒冷去，要在节前洁净自己。
chapters.en: And the Jews' passover was nigh at hand: and many went out of the country up to Jerusalem before the passover, to purify themselves.

chapters.zh: 他们就寻找耶稣，站在殿里彼此说：你们的意思如何，他不来过节么？
chapters.en: Then sought they for Jesus, and spake among themselves, as they stood in the temple, What think ye, that he will not come to the feast?

chapters.zh: 那时，祭司长和法利赛人早已吩咐说，若有人知道耶稣在那里，就要报明，好去拿他。
chapters.en: Now both the chief priests and the Pharisees had given a commandment, that, if any man knew where he were, he should shew , that they might take him.

chapters.zh: 逾越节前六日，耶稣来到伯大尼，就是他叫拉撒路从死里复活之处。
chapters.en: Then Jesus six days before the passover came to Bethany, where Lazarus was which had been dead, whom he raised from the dead.

chapters.zh: 有人在那里给耶稣预备筵席；马大伺候，拉撒路也在那同耶稣坐席的人中。
chapters.en: There they made him a supper; and Martha served: but Lazarus was one of them that sat at the table with him.

chapters.zh: 马利亚就拿著一斤极贵的真哪哒香膏，抹耶稣的脚，又用自己头发去擦，屋里就满了膏的香气。
chapters.en: Then took Mary a pound of ointment of spikenard, very costly, and anointed the feet of Jesus, and wiped his feet with her hair: and the house was filled with the odour of the ointment.

chapters.zh: 有一个门徒，就是那将要卖耶稣的加略人犹大，
chapters.en: Then saith one of his disciples, Judas Iscariot, Simon's , which should betray him,

chapters.zh: 说：这香膏为甚么不卖三十两银子赒济穷人呢？
chapters.en: Why was not this ointment sold for three hundred pence, and given to the poor?

chapters.zh: 他说这话，并不是挂念穷人，乃因他是个贼，又带著钱囊，常取其中所存的。
chapters.en: This he said, not that he cared for the poor; but because he was a thief, and had the bag, and bare what was put therein.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：由他罢！他是为我安葬之日存留的。
chapters.en: Then said Jesus, Let her alone: against the day of my burying hath she kept this.

chapters.zh: 因为常有穷人和你们同在，只是你们不常有我。
chapters.en: For the poor always ye have with you; but me ye have not always.

chapters.zh: 有许多犹太人知道耶稣在那里，就来了，不但是为耶稣的缘故，也是要看他从死里所复活的拉撒路。
chapters.en: Much people of the Jews therefore knew that he was there: and they came not for Jesus' sake only, but that they might see Lazarus also, whom he had raised from the dead.

chapters.zh: 但祭司长商议连拉撒路也要杀了；
chapters.en: But the chief priests consulted that they might put Lazarus also to death;

chapters.zh: 因有好些犹太人为拉撒路的缘故，回去信了耶稣。
chapters.en: Because that by reason of him many of the Jews went away, and believed on Jesus.

chapters.zh: 第二天，有许多上来过节的人听见耶稣将到耶路撒冷，
chapters.en: On the next day much people that were come to the feast, when they heard that Jesus was coming to Jerusalem,

chapters.zh: 就拿著棕树枝出去迎接他，喊著说：和散那！奉主名来的以色列王是应当称颂的！
chapters.en: Took branches of palm trees, and went forth to meet him, and cried, Hosanna: Blessed the King of Israel that cometh in the name of the Lord.

chapters.zh: 耶稣得了一个驴驹，就骑上，如经上所记的说：
chapters.en: And Jesus, when he had found a young ass, sat thereon; as it is written,

chapters.zh: 锡安的民（原文作女子）哪，不要惧怕！你的王骑著驴驹来了。
chapters.en: Fear not, daughter of Sion: behold, thy King cometh, sitting on an ass's colt.

chapters.zh: 这些事门徒起先不明白，等到耶稣得了荣耀以后才想起这话是指著他写的，并且众人果然向他这样行了。
chapters.en: These things understood not his disciples at the first: but when Jesus was glorified, then remembered they that these things were written of him, and they had done these things unto him.

chapters.zh: 当耶稣呼唤拉撒路，叫他从死复活出坟墓的时候，同耶稣在那里的众人就作见证。
chapters.en: The people therefore that was with him when he called Lazarus out of his grave, and raised him from the dead, bare record.

chapters.zh: 众人因听见耶稣行了这神迹，就去迎接他。
chapters.en: For this cause the people also met him, for that they heard that he had done this miracle.

chapters.zh: 法利赛人彼此说：看哪，你们是徒劳无益，世人都随从他去了。
chapters.en: The Pharisees therefore said among themselves, Perceive ye how ye prevail nothing? behold, the world is gone after him.

chapters.zh: 那时，上来过节礼拜的人中，有几个希利尼人。
chapters.en: And there were certain Greeks among them that came up to worship at the feast:

chapters.zh: 他们来见加利利伯赛大的腓力，求他说：先生，我们愿意见耶稣。
chapters.en: The same came therefore to Philip, which was of Bethsaida of Galilee, and desired him, saying, Sir, we would see Jesus.

chapters.zh: 腓力去告诉安得烈，安得烈同腓力去告诉耶稣。
chapters.en: Philip cometh and telleth Andrew: and again Andrew and Philip tell Jesus.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：人子得荣耀的时候到了。
chapters.en: And Jesus answered them, saying, The hour is come, that the Son of man should be glorified.

chapters.zh: 我实实在在的告诉你们，一粒麦子不落在地里死了，仍旧是一粒，若是死了，就结出许多子粒来。
chapters.en: Verily, verily, I say unto you, Except a corn of wheat fall into the ground and die, it abideth alone: but if it die, it bringeth forth much fruit.

chapters.zh: 爱惜自己生命的，就失丧生命；在这世上恨恶自己生命的，就要保守生命到永生。
chapters.en: He that loveth his life shall lose it; and he that hateth his life in this world shall keep it unto life eternal.

chapters.zh: 若有人服事我，就当跟从我；我在那里，服事我的人也要在那里；若有人服事我，我父必尊重他。
chapters.en: If any man serve me, let him follow me; and where I am, there shall also my servant be: if any man serve me, him will Father honour.

chapters.zh: 我现在心里忧愁，我说甚么才好呢？父阿，救我脱离这时候；但我原是为这时候来的。
chapters.en: Now is my soul troubled; and what shall I say? Father, save me from this hour: but for this cause came I unto this hour.

chapters.zh: 父阿，愿你荣耀你的名！当时就有声音从天上来，说：我已经荣耀了我的名，还要再荣耀。
chapters.en: Father, glorify thy name. Then came there a voice from heaven, , I have both glorified , and will glorify again.

chapters.zh: 站在旁边的众人听见，就说：打雷了。还有人说：有天使对他说话。
chapters.en: The people therefore, that stood by, and heard , said that it thundered: others said, An angel spake to him.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：这声音不是为我，是为你们来的。
chapters.en: Jesus answered and said, This voice came not because of me, but for your sakes.

chapters.zh: 现在这世界受审判，这世界的王要被赶出去。
chapters.en: Now is the judgment of this world: now shall the prince of this world be cast out.

chapters.zh: 我若从地上被举起来，就要吸引万人来归我。
chapters.en: And I, if I be lifted up from the earth, will draw all unto me.

chapters.zh: 耶稣这话原是指著自己将要怎样死说的。
chapters.en: This he said, signifying what death he should die.

chapters.zh: 众人回答说：我们听见律法上有话说，基督是永存的，你怎么说人子必须被举起来呢？这人子是谁呢？
chapters.en: The people answered him, We have heard out of the law that Christ abideth for ever: and how sayest thou, The Son of man must be lifted up? who is this Son of man?

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他们说：光在你们中间还有不多的时候，应当趁著有光行走，免得黑暗临到你们；那在黑暗里行走的，不知道往何处去。
chapters.en: Then Jesus said unto them, Yet a little while is the light with you. Walk while ye have the light, lest darkness come upon you: for he that walketh in darkness knoweth not whither he goeth.

chapters.zh: 你们应当趁著有光，信从这光，使你们成为光明之子。耶稣说了这话，就离开隐藏了。
chapters.en: While ye have light, believe in the light, that ye may be the children of light. These things spake Jesus, and departed, and did hide himself from them.

chapters.zh: 他虽然在他们面前行了许多神迹，他们还是不信他。
chapters.en: But though he had done so many miracles before them, yet they believed not on him:

chapters.zh: 这是要应验先知以赛亚的话，说：主阿，我们所传的有谁信呢？主的膀臂向谁显露呢？
chapters.en: That the saying of Esaias the prophet might be fulfilled, which he spake, Lord, who hath believed our report? and to whom hath the arm of the Lord been revealed?

chapters.zh: 他们所以不能信，因为以赛亚又说：
chapters.en: Therefore they could not believe, because that Esaias said again,

chapters.zh: 主叫他们瞎了眼，硬了心，免得他们眼睛看见，心里明白，回转过来，我就医治他们。
chapters.en: He hath blinded their eyes, and hardened their heart; that they should not see with eyes, nor understand with heart, and be converted, and I should heal them.

chapters.zh: 以赛亚因为看见他的荣耀，就指著他说这话。
chapters.en: These things said Esaias, when he saw his glory, and spake of him.

chapters.zh: 虽然如此，官长中却有好些信他的，只因法利赛人的缘故，就不承认，恐怕被赶出会堂。
chapters.en: Nevertheless among the chief rulers also many believed on him; but because of the Pharisees they did not confess , lest they should be put out of the synagogue:

chapters.zh: 这是因他们爱人的荣耀过于爱神的荣耀。
chapters.en: For they loved the praise of men more than the praise of God.

chapters.zh: 耶稣大声说：信我的，不是信我，乃是信那差我来的。
chapters.en: Jesus cried and said, He that believeth on me, believeth not on me, but on him that sent me.

chapters.zh: 人看见我，就是看见那差我来的。
chapters.en: And he that seeth me seeth him that sent me.

chapters.zh: 我到世上来，乃是光，叫凡信我的，不住在黑暗里。
chapters.en: I am come a light into the world, that whosoever believeth on me should not abide in darkness.

chapters.zh: 若有人听见我的话不遵守，我不审判他。我来本不是要审判世界，乃是要拯救世界。
chapters.en: And if any man hear my words, and believe not, I judge him not: for I came not to judge the world, but to save the world.

chapters.zh: 弃绝我、不领受我话的人，有审判他的 ─ 就是我所讲的道在末日要审判他。
chapters.en: He that rejecteth me, and receiveth not my words, hath one that judgeth him: the word that I have spoken, the same shall judge him in the last day.

chapters.zh: 因为我没有凭著自己讲，惟有差我来的父已经给我命令，叫我说甚么，讲甚么。
chapters.en: For I have not spoken of myself; but the Father which sent me, he gave me a commandment, what I should say, and what I should speak.

chapters.zh: 我也知道他的命令就是永生。故此，我所讲的话正是照著父对我所说的。
chapters.en: And I know that his commandment is life everlasting: whatsoever I speak therefore, even as the Father said unto me, so I speak.

chapters.zh: 逾越节以前，耶稣知道自己离世归父的时候到了。他既然爱世间属自己的人，就爱他们到底。
chapters.en: Now before the feast of the passover, when Jesus knew that his hour was come that he should depart out of this world unto the Father, having loved his own which were in the world, he loved them unto the end.

chapters.zh: 吃晚饭的时候，魔鬼已将卖耶稣的意思放在西门的儿子加略人犹大心里。
chapters.en: And supper being ended, the devil having now put into the heart of Judas Iscariot, Simon's , to betray him;

chapters.zh: 耶稣知道父已将万有交在他手里，且知道自己是从神出来的，又要归到神那里去，
chapters.en: Jesus knowing that the Father had given all things into his hands, and that he was come from God, and went to God;

chapters.zh: 就离席站起来，脱了衣服，拿一条手巾束腰，
chapters.en: He riseth from supper, and laid aside his garments; and took a towel, and girded himself.

chapters.zh: 随后把水倒在盆里，就洗门徒的脚，并用自己所束的手巾擦干。
chapters.en: After that he poureth water into a bason, and began to wash the disciples' feet, and to wipe with the towel wherewith he was girded.

chapters.zh: 挨到西门彼得，彼得对他说：主阿，你洗我的脚么？
chapters.en: Then cometh he to Simon Peter: and Peter saith unto him, Lord, dost thou wash my feet?

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：我所做的，你如今不知道，后来必明白。
chapters.en: Jesus answered and said unto him, What I do thou knowest not now; but thou shalt know hereafter.

chapters.zh: 彼得说：你永不可洗我的脚！耶稣说：我若不洗你，你就与我无分了。
chapters.en: Peter saith unto him, Thou shalt never wash my feet. Jesus answered him, If I wash thee not, thou hast no part with me.

chapters.zh: 西门彼得说：主阿，不但我的脚，连手和头也要洗。
chapters.en: Simon Peter saith unto him, Lord, not my feet only, but also hands and head.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：凡洗过澡的人，只要把脚一洗，全身就干净了。你们是干净的，然而不都是干净的。
chapters.en: Jesus saith to him, He that is washed needeth not save to wash feet, but is clean every whit: and ye are clean, but not all.

chapters.zh: 耶稣原知道要卖他的是谁，所以说：你们不都是干净的。
chapters.en: For he knew who should betray him; therefore said he, Ye are not all clean.

chapters.zh: 耶稣洗完了他们的脚，就穿上衣服，又坐下，对他们说：我向你们所做的，你们明白么？
chapters.en: So after he had washed their feet, and had taken his garments, and was set down again, he said unto them, Know ye what I have done to you?

chapters.zh: 你们称呼我夫子，称呼我主，你们说的不错，我本来是。
chapters.en: Ye call me Master and Lord: and ye say well; for I am.

chapters.zh: 我是你们的主，你们的夫子，尚且洗你们的脚，你们也当彼此洗脚。
chapters.en: If I then, Lord and Master, have washed your feet; ye also ought to wash one another's feet.

chapters.zh: 我给你们做了榜样，叫你们照著我向你们所做的去做。
chapters.en: For I have given you an example, that ye should do as I have done to you.

chapters.zh: 我实实在在的告诉你们，仆人不能大于主人，差人也不能大于差他的人。
chapters.en: Verily, verily, I say unto you, The servant is not greater than his lord; neither he that is sent greater than he that sent him.

chapters.zh: 你们既知道这事，若是去行就有福了。
chapters.en: If ye know these things, happy are ye if ye do them.

chapters.zh: 我这话不是指著你们众人说的，我知道我所拣选的是谁。现在要应验经上的话，说：同我吃饭的人用脚踢我。
chapters.en: I speak not of you all: I know whom I have chosen: but that the scripture may be fulfilled, He that eateth bread with me hath lifted up his heel against me.

chapters.zh: 如今事情还没有成就，我要先告诉你们，叫你们到事情成就的时候可以信我是基督。
chapters.en: Now I tell you before it come, that, when it is come to pass, ye may believe that I am .

chapters.zh: 我实实在在的告诉你们，有人接待我所差遣的，就是接待我；接待我，就是接待那差遣我的。
chapters.en: Verily, verily, I say unto you, He that receiveth whomsoever I send receiveth me; and he that receiveth me receiveth him that sent me.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说了这话，心里忧愁，就明说：我实实在在的告诉你们，你们中间有一个人要卖我了。
chapters.en: When Jesus had thus said, he was troubled in spirit, and testified, and said, Verily, verily, I say unto you, that one of you shall betray me.

chapters.zh: 门徒彼此对看，猜不透所说的是谁。
chapters.en: Then the disciples looked one on another, doubting of whom he spake.

chapters.zh: 有一个门徒，是耶稣所爱的，侧身挨近耶稣的怀里。
chapters.en: Now there was leaning on Jesus' bosom one of his disciples, whom Jesus loved.

chapters.zh: 西门彼得点头对他说：你告诉我们，主是指著谁说的。
chapters.en: Simon Peter therefore beckoned to him, that he should ask who it should be of whom he spake.

chapters.zh: 那门徒便就势靠著耶稣的胸膛，问他说：主阿，是谁呢？
chapters.en: He then lying on Jesus' breast saith unto him, Lord, who is it?

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：我蘸一点饼给谁，就是谁。耶稣就蘸了一点饼，递给加略人西门的儿子犹大。
chapters.en: Jesus answered, He it is, to whom I shall give a sop, when I have dipped . And when he had dipped the sop, he gave to Judas Iscariot, of Simon.

chapters.zh: 他吃了以后，撒但就入了他的心。耶稣便对他说：你所做的，快做罢！
chapters.en: And after the sop Satan entered into him. Then said Jesus unto him, That thou doest, do quickly.

chapters.zh: 同席的人没有一个知道是为甚么对他说这话。
chapters.en: Now no man at the table knew for what intent he spake this unto him.

chapters.zh: 有人因犹大带著钱囊，以为耶稣是对他说：你去买我们过节所应用的东西，或是叫他拿甚么赒济穷人。
chapters.en: For some thought, because Judas had the bag, that Jesus had said unto him, Buy that we have need of against the feast; or, that he should give something to the poor.

chapters.zh: 犹大受了那点饼，立刻就出去。那时候是夜间了。
chapters.en: He then having received the sop went immediately out: and it was night.

chapters.zh: 他既出去，耶稣就说：如今人子得了荣耀，神在人子身上也得了荣耀。
chapters.en: Therefore, when he was gone out, Jesus said, Now is the Son of man glorified, and God is glorified in him.

chapters.zh: 神要因自己荣耀人子，并且要快快的荣耀他。
chapters.en: If God be glorified in him, God shall also glorify him in himself, and shall straightway glorify him.

chapters.zh: 小子们，我还有不多的时候与你们同在；后来你们要找我，但我所去的地方你们不能到。这话我曾对犹太人说过，如今也照样对你们说。
chapters.en: Little children, yet a little while I am with you. Ye shall seek me: and as I said unto the Jews, Whither I go, ye cannot come; so now I say to you.

chapters.zh: 我赐给你们一条新命令，乃是叫你们彼此相爱；我怎样爱你们，你们也要怎样相爱。
chapters.en: A new commandment I give unto you, That ye love one another; as I have loved you, that ye also love one another.

chapters.zh: 你们若有彼此相爱的心，众人因此就认出你们是我的门徒了。
chapters.en: By this shall all know that ye are my disciples, if ye have love one to another.

chapters.zh: 西门彼得问耶稣说：主往那里去？耶稣回答说：我所去的地方，你现在不能跟我去，后来却要跟我去。
chapters.en: Simon Peter said unto him, Lord, whither goest thou? Jesus answered him, Whither I go, thou canst not follow me now; but thou shalt follow me afterwards.

chapters.zh: 彼得说：主阿，我为甚么现在不能跟你去？我愿意为你舍命！
chapters.en: Peter said unto him, Lord, why cannot I follow thee now? I will lay down my life for thy sake.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：你愿意为我舍命么？我实实在在的告诉你，鸡叫以先，你要三次不认我。
chapters.en: Jesus answered him, Wilt thou lay down thy life for my sake? Verily, verily, I say unto thee, The cock shall not crow, till thou hast denied me thrice.

chapters.zh: 你们心里不要忧愁；你们信神，也当信我。
chapters.en: Let not your heart be troubled: ye believe in God, believe also in me.

chapters.zh: 在我父的家里有许多住处；若是没有，我就早已告诉你们了。我去原是为你们预备地方去。
chapters.en: In my Father's house are many mansions: if not , I would have told you. I go to prepare a place for you.

chapters.zh: 我若去为你们预备了地方，就必再来接你们到我那里去，我在那里，叫你们也在那里。
chapters.en: And if I go and prepare a place for you, I will come again, and receive you unto myself; that where I am, ye may be also.

chapters.zh: 我往那里去，你们知道；那条路，你们也知道（有古卷作：我往那里去，你们知道那条路）。
chapters.en: And whither I go ye know, and the way ye know.

chapters.zh: 多马对他说：主阿，我们不知道你往那里去，怎么知道那条路呢？
chapters.en: Thomas saith unto him, Lord, we know not whither thou goest; and how can we know the way?

chapters.zh: 耶稣说我就是道路、真理、生命；若不藉著我，没有人能到父那里去。
chapters.en: Jesus saith unto him, I am the way, the truth, and the life: no man cometh unto the Father, but by me.

chapters.zh: 你们若认识我，也就认识我的父。从今以后，你们认识他，并且已经看见他。
chapters.en: If ye had known me, ye should have known my Father also: and from henceforth ye know him, and have seen him.

chapters.zh: 腓力对他说：求主将父显给我们看，我们就知足了。
chapters.en: Philip saith unto him, Lord, shew us the Father, and it sufficeth us.

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他说：腓力，我与你们同在这样长久，你还不认识我么？人看见了我，就是看见了父；你怎么说将父显给我们看呢？
chapters.en: Jesus saith unto him, Have I been so long time with you, and yet hast thou not known me, Philip? he that hath seen me hath seen the Father; and how sayest thou , Shew us the Father?

chapters.zh: 我在父里面，父在我里面，你不信么？我对你们所说的话，不是凭著自己说的，乃是住在我里面的父做他自己的事。
chapters.en: Believest thou not that I am in the Father, and the Father in me? the words that I speak unto you I speak not of myself: but the Father that dwelleth in me, he doeth the works.

chapters.zh: 你们当信我，我在父里面，父在我里面；即或不信，也当因我所做的事信我。
chapters.en: Believe me that I in the Father, and the Father in me: or else believe me for the very works' sake.

chapters.zh: 我实实在在的告诉你们，我所做的事，信我的人也要做，并且要做比这更大的事，因为我往父那里去。
chapters.en: Verily, verily, I say unto you, He that believeth on me, the works that I do shall he do also; and greater than these shall he do; because I go unto my Father.

chapters.zh: 你们奉我的名无论求甚么，我必成就，叫父因儿子得荣耀。
chapters.en: And whatsoever ye shall ask in my name, that will I do, that the Father may be glorified in the Son.

chapters.zh: 你们若奉我的名求甚么，我必成就。
chapters.en: If ye shall ask any thing in my name, I will do .

chapters.zh: 你们若爱我，就必遵守我的命令。
chapters.en: If ye love me, keep my commandments.

chapters.zh: 我要求父，父就另外赐给你们一位保惠师（或作：训慰师；下同），叫他永远与你们同在，
chapters.en: And I will pray the Father, and he shall give you another Comforter, that he may abide with you for ever;

chapters.zh: 就是真理的圣灵，乃世人不能接受的；因为不见他，也不认识他。你们却认识他，因他常与你们同在，也要在你们里面。
chapters.en: the Spirit of truth; whom the world cannot receive, because it seeth him not, neither knoweth him: but ye know him; for he dwelleth with you, and shall be in you.

chapters.zh: 我不撇下你们为孤儿，我必到你们这里来。
chapters.en: I will not leave you comfortless: I will come to you.

chapters.zh: 还有不多的时候，世人不再看见我，你们却看见我；因为我活著，你们也要活著。
chapters.en: Yet a little while, and the world seeth me no more; but ye see me: because I live, ye shall live also.

chapters.zh: 到那日，你们就知道我在父里面，你们在我里面，我也在你们里面。
chapters.en: At that day ye shall know that I in my Father, and ye in me, and I in you.

chapters.zh: 有了我的命令又遵守的，这人就是爱我的；爱我的必蒙我父爱他，我也要爱他，并且要向他显现。
chapters.en: He that hath my commandments, and keepeth them, he it is that loveth me: and he that loveth me shall be loved of my Father, and I will love him, and will manifest myself to him.

chapters.zh: 犹大（不是加略人犹大）问耶稣说：主阿，为甚么要向我们显现，不向世人显现呢？
chapters.en: Judas saith unto him, not Iscariot, Lord, how is it that thou wilt manifest thyself unto us, and not unto the world?

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：人若爱我，就必遵守我的道；我父也必爱他，并且我们要到他那里去，与他同住。
chapters.en: Jesus answered and said unto him, If a man love me, he will keep my words: and my Father will love him, and we will come unto him, and make our abode with him.

chapters.zh: 不爱我的人就不遵守我的道。你们所听见的道不是我的，乃是差我来之父的道。
chapters.en: He that loveth me not keepeth not my sayings: and the word which ye hear is not mine, but the Father's which sent me.

chapters.zh: 我还与你们同住的时候，已将这些话对你们说了。
chapters.en: These things have I spoken unto you, being present with you.

chapters.zh: 但保惠师，就是父因我的名所要差来的圣灵，他要将一切的事指教你们，并且要叫你们想起我对你们所说的一切话。
chapters.en: But the Comforter, the Holy Ghost, whom the Father will send in my name, he shall teach you all things, and bring all things to your remembrance, whatsoever I have said unto you.

chapters.zh: 我留下平安给你们；我将我的平安赐给你们。我所赐的，不像世人所赐的。你们心里不要忧愁，也不要胆怯。
chapters.en: Peace I leave with you, my peace I give unto you: not as the world giveth, give I unto you. Let not your heart be troubled, neither let it be afraid.

chapters.zh: 你们听见我对你们说了，我去还要到你们这里来。你们若爱我，因我到父那里去，就必喜乐，因为父是比我大的。
chapters.en: Ye have heard how I said unto you, I go away, and come unto you. If ye loved me, ye would rejoice, because I said, I go unto the Father: for my Father is greater than I.

chapters.zh: 现在事情还没有成就，我预先告诉你们，叫你们到事情成就的时候就可以信。
chapters.en: And now I have told you before it come to pass, that, when it is come to pass, ye might believe.

chapters.zh: 以后我不再和你们多说话，因为这世界的王将到。他在我里面是毫无所有；
chapters.en: Hereafter I will not talk much with you: for the prince of this world cometh, and hath nothing in me.

chapters.zh: 但要叫世人知道我爱父，并且父怎样吩咐我，我就怎样行。起来，我们走罢！
chapters.en: But that the world may know that I love the Father; and as the Father gave me commandment, even so I do. Arise, let us go hence.

chapters.zh: 我是真葡萄树，我父是栽培的人。
chapters.en: I am the true vine, and my Father is the husbandman.

chapters.zh: 凡属我不结果子的枝子，他就剪去；凡结果子的，他就修理干净，使枝子结果子更多。
chapters.en: Every branch in me that beareth not fruit he taketh away: and every that beareth fruit, he purgeth it, that it may bring forth more fruit.

chapters.zh: 现在你们因我讲给你们的道，已经干净了。
chapters.en: Now ye are clean through the word which I have spoken unto you.

chapters.zh: 你们要常在我里面，我也常在你们里面。枝子若不常在葡萄树上，自己就不能结果子；你们若不常在我里面，也是这样。
chapters.en: Abide in me, and I in you. As the branch cannot bear fruit of itself, except it abide in the vine; no more can ye, except ye abide in me.

chapters.zh: 我是葡萄树，你们是枝子。常在我里面的，我也常在他里面，这人就多结果子；因为离了我，你们就不能做甚么。
chapters.en: I am the vine, ye the branches: He that abideth in me, and I in him, the same bringeth forth much fruit: for without me ye can do nothing.

chapters.zh: 人若不常在我里面，就像枝子丢在外面枯干，人拾起来，扔在火里烧了。
chapters.en: If a man abide not in me, he is cast forth as a branch, and is withered; and men gather them, and cast into the fire, and they are burned.

chapters.zh: 你们若常在我里面，我的话也常在你们里面，凡你们所愿意的，祈求，就给你们成就。
chapters.en: If ye abide in me, and my words abide in you, ye shall ask what ye will, and it shall be done unto you.

chapters.zh: 你们多结果子，我父就因此得荣耀，你们也就是我的门徒了。
chapters.en: Herein is my Father glorified, that ye bear much fruit; so shall ye be my disciples.

chapters.zh: 我爱你们，正如父爱我一样；你们要常在我的爱里。
chapters.en: As the Father hath loved me, so have I loved you: continue ye in my love.

chapters.zh: 你们若遵守我的命令，就常在我的爱里，正如我遵守了我父的命令，常在他的爱里。
chapters.en: If ye keep my commandments, ye shall abide in my love; even as I have kept my Father's commandments, and abide in his love.

chapters.zh: 这些事我已经对你们说了，是要叫我的喜乐存在你们心里，并叫你们的喜乐可以满足。
chapters.en: These things have I spoken unto you, that my joy might remain in you, and your joy might be full.

chapters.zh: 你们要彼此相爱，像我爱你们一样；这就是我的命令。
chapters.en: This is my commandment, That ye love one another, as I have loved you.

chapters.zh: 人为朋友舍命，人的爱心没有比这个大的。
chapters.en: Greater love hath no man than this, that a man lay down his life for his friends.

chapters.zh: 你们若遵行我所吩咐的，就是我的朋友了。
chapters.en: Ye are my friends, if ye do whatsoever I command you.

chapters.zh: 以后我不再称你们为仆人，因仆人不知道主人所做的事。我乃称你们为朋友；因我从我父所听见的，已经都告诉你们了。
chapters.en: Henceforth I call you not servants; for the servant knoweth not what his lord doeth: but I have called you friends; for all things that I have heard of my Father I have made known unto you.

chapters.zh: 不是你们拣选了我，是我拣选了你们，并且分派你们去结果子，叫你们的果子常存，使你们奉我的名，无论向父求甚么，他就赐给你们。
chapters.en: Ye have not chosen me, but I have chosen you, and ordained you, that ye should go and bring forth fruit, and your fruit should remain: that whatsoever ye shall ask of the Father in my name, he may give it you.

chapters.zh: 我这样吩咐你们，是要叫你们彼此相爱。
chapters.en: These things I command you, that ye love one another.

chapters.zh: 世人若恨你们，你们知道（或作：该知道），恨你们以先已经恨我了。
chapters.en: If the world hate you, ye know that it hated me before you.

chapters.zh: 你们若属世界，世界必爱属自己的；只因你们不属世界，乃是我从世界中拣选了你们，所以世界就恨你们。
chapters.en: If ye were of the world, the world would love his own: but because ye are not of the world, but I have chosen you out of the world, therefore the world hateth you.

chapters.zh: 你们要记念我从前对你们所说的话：仆人不能大于主人。他们若逼迫了我，也要逼迫你们；若遵守了我的话，也要遵守你们的话。
chapters.en: Remember the word that I said unto you, The servant is not greater than his lord. If they have persecuted me, they will also persecute you; if they have kept my saying, they will keep yours also.

chapters.zh: 但他们因我的名要向你们行这一切的事，因为他们不认识那差我来的。
chapters.en: But all these things will they do unto you for my name's sake, because they know not him that sent me.

chapters.zh: 我若没有来教训他们，他们就没有罪；但如今他们的罪无可推诿了。
chapters.en: If I had not come and spoken unto them, they had not had sin: but now they have no cloke for their sin.

chapters.zh: 恨我的，也恨我的父。
chapters.en: He that hateth me hateth my Father also.

chapters.zh: 我若没有在他们中间行过别人未曾行的事，他们就没有罪；但如今连我与我的父，他们也看见也恨恶了。
chapters.en: If I had not done among them the works which none other man did, they had not had sin: but now have they both seen and hated both me and my Father.

chapters.zh: 这要应验他们律法上所写的话，说：他们无故的恨我。
chapters.en: But , that the word might be fulfilled that is written in their law, They hated me without a cause.

chapters.zh: 但我要从父那里差保惠师来，就是从父出来真理的圣灵；他来了，就要为我作见证。
chapters.en: But when the Comforter is come, whom I will send unto you from the Father, the Spirit of truth, which proceedeth from the Father, he shall testify of me:

chapters.zh: 你们也要作见证，因为你们从起头就与我同在。
chapters.en: And ye also shall bear witness, because ye have been with me from the beginning.

chapters.zh: 我已将这些事告诉你们，使你们不至于跌倒。
chapters.en: These things have I spoken unto you, that ye should not be offended.

chapters.zh: 人要把你们赶出会堂，并且时候将到，凡杀你们的就以为是事奉神。
chapters.en: They shall put you out of the synagogues: yea, the time cometh, that whosoever killeth you will think that he doeth God service.

chapters.zh: 他们这样行，是因未曾认识父，也未曾认识我。
chapters.en: And these things will they do unto you, because they have not known the Father, nor me.

chapters.zh: 我将这事告诉你们，是叫你们到了时候可以想起我对你们说过了。我起先没有将这事告诉你们，因为我与你们同在。
chapters.en: But these things have I told you, that when the time shall come, ye may remember that I told you of them. And these things I said not unto you at the beginning, because I was with you.

chapters.zh: 现今我往差我来的父那里去，你们中间并没有人问我：你往那里去？
chapters.en: But now I go my way to him that sent me; and none of you asketh me, Whither goest thou?

chapters.zh: 只因我将这事告诉你们，你们就满心忧愁。
chapters.en: But because I have said these things unto you, sorrow hath filled your heart.

chapters.zh: 然而，我将真情告诉你们，我去是与你们有益的；我若不去，保惠师就不到你们这里来；我若去，就差他来。
chapters.en: Nevertheless I tell you the truth; It is expedient for you that I go away: for if I go not away, the Comforter will not come unto you; but if I depart, I will send him unto you.

chapters.zh: 他既来了，就要叫世人为罪、为义、为审判，自己责备自己。
chapters.en: And when he is come, he will reprove the world of sin, and of righteousness, and of judgment:

chapters.zh: 为罪，是因他们不信我；
chapters.en: Of sin, because they believe not on me;

chapters.zh: 为义，是因我往父那里去，你们就不再见我；
chapters.en: Of righteousness, because I go to my Father, and ye see me no more;

chapters.zh: 为审判，是因这世界的王受了审判。
chapters.en: Of judgment, because the prince of this world is judged.

chapters.zh: 我还有好些事要告诉你们，但你们现在担当不了（或作：不能领会）。
chapters.en: I have yet many things to say unto you, but ye cannot bear them now.

chapters.zh: 只等真理的圣灵来了，他要引导你们明白（原文作进入）一切的真理；因为他不是凭自己说的，乃是把他所听见的都说出来，并要把将来的事告诉你们。
chapters.en: Howbeit when he, the Spirit of truth, is come, he will guide you into all truth: for he shall not speak of himself; but whatsoever he shall hear, shall he speak: and he will shew you things to come.

chapters.zh: 他要荣耀我，因为他要将受于我的告诉你们。
chapters.en: He shall glorify me: for he shall receive of mine, and shall shew unto you.

chapters.zh: 凡父所有的，都是我的；所以我说，他要将受于我的告诉你们。
chapters.en: All things that the Father hath are mine: therefore said I, that he shall take of mine, and shall shew unto you.

chapters.zh: 等不多时，你们就不得见我；再等不多时，你们还要见我。
chapters.en: A little while, and ye shall not see me: and again, a little while, and ye shall see me, because I go to the Father.

chapters.zh: 有几个门徒就彼此说：他对我们说：等不多时，你们就不得见我；再等不多时，你们还要见我；又说：因我往父那里去。这是甚么意思呢？
chapters.en: Then said of his disciples among themselves, What is this that he saith unto us, A little while, and ye shall not see me: and again, a little while, and ye shall see me: and, Because I go to the Father?

chapters.zh: 门徒彼此说：他说等不多时到底是甚么意思呢？我们不明白他所说的话。
chapters.en: They said therefore, What is this that he saith, A little while? we cannot tell what he saith.

chapters.zh: 耶稣看出他们要问他，就说：我说等不多时，你们就不得见我；再等不多时，你们还要见我，你们为这话彼此相问么？
chapters.en: Now Jesus knew that they were desirous to ask him, and said unto them, Do ye enquire among yourselves of that I said, A little while, and ye shall not see me: and again, a little while, and ye shall see me?

chapters.zh: 我实实在在的告诉你们，你们将要痛哭、哀号，世人倒要喜乐；你们将要忧愁，然而你们的忧愁要变为喜乐。
chapters.en: Verily, verily, I say unto you, That ye shall weep and lament, but the world shall rejoice: and ye shall be sorrowful, but your sorrow shall be turned into joy.

chapters.zh: 妇人生产的时候就忧愁，因为他的时候到了；既生了孩子，就不再记念那苦楚，因为欢喜世上生了一个人。
chapters.en: A woman when she is in travail hath sorrow, because her hour is come: but as soon as she is delivered of the child, she remembereth no more the anguish, for joy that a man is born into the world.

chapters.zh: 你们现在也是忧愁，但我要再见你们，你们的心就喜乐了；这喜乐也没有人能夺去。
chapters.en: And ye now therefore have sorrow: but I will see you again, and your heart shall rejoice, and your joy no man taketh from you.

chapters.zh: 到那日，你们甚么也就不问我了。我实实在在的告诉你们，你们若向父求甚么，他必因我的名赐给你们。
chapters.en: And in that day ye shall ask me nothing. Verily, verily, I say unto you, Whatsoever ye shall ask the Father in my name, he will give you.

chapters.zh: 向来你们没有奉我的名求甚么，如今你们求，就必得著，叫你们的喜乐可以满足。
chapters.en: Hitherto have ye asked nothing in my name: ask, and ye shall receive, that your joy may be full.

chapters.zh: 这些事，我是用比喻对你们说的；时候将到，我不再用比喻对你们说，乃要将父明明的告诉你们。
chapters.en: These things have I spoken unto you in proverbs: but the time cometh, when I shall no more speak unto you in proverbs, but I shall shew you plainly of the Father.

chapters.zh: 到那日，你们要奉我的名祈求；我并不对你们说，我要为你们求父。
chapters.en: At that day ye shall ask in my name: and I say not unto you, that I will pray the Father for you:

chapters.zh: 父自己爱你们；因为你们已经爱我，又信我是从父出来的。
chapters.en: For the Father himself loveth you, because ye have loved me, and have believed that I came out from God.

chapters.zh: 我从父出来，到了世界；我又离开世界，往父那里去。
chapters.en: I came forth from the Father, and am come into the world: again, I leave the world, and go to the Father.

chapters.zh: 门徒说：如今你是明说，并不用比喻了。
chapters.en: His disciples said unto him, Lo, now speakest thou plainly, and speakest no proverb.

chapters.zh: 现在我们晓得你凡事都知道，也不用人问你，因此我们信你是从神出来的。
chapters.en: Now are we sure that thou knowest all things, and needest not that any man should ask thee: by this we believe that thou camest forth from God.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：现在你们信么？
chapters.en: Jesus answered them, Do ye now believe?

chapters.zh: 看哪，时候将到，且是已经到了，你们要分散，各归自己的地方去，留下我独自一人；其实我不是独自一人，因为有父与我同在。
chapters.en: Behold, the hour cometh, yea, is now come, that ye shall be scattered, every man to his own, and shall leave me alone: and yet I am not alone, because the Father is with me.

chapters.zh: 我将这些事告诉你们，是要叫你们在我里面有平安。在世上，你们有苦难；但你们可以放心，我已经胜了世界。
chapters.en: These things I have spoken unto you, that in me ye might have peace. In the world ye shall have tribulation: but be of good cheer; I have overcome the world.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说了这话，就举目望天，说：父阿，时候到了，愿你荣耀你的儿子，使儿子也荣耀你；
chapters.en: These words spake Jesus, and lifted up his eyes to heaven, and said, Father, the hour is come; glorify thy Son, that thy Son also may glorify thee:

chapters.zh: 正如你曾赐给他权柄管理凡有血气的，叫他将永生赐给你所赐给他的人。
chapters.en: As thou hast given him power over all flesh, that he should give eternal life to as many as thou hast given him.

chapters.zh: 认识你 ─ 独一的真神，并且认识你所差来的耶稣基督，这就是永生。
chapters.en: And this is life eternal, that they might know thee the only true God, and Jesus Christ, whom thou hast sent.

chapters.zh: 我在地上已经荣耀你，你所托付我的事，我已成全了。
chapters.en: I have glorified thee on the earth: I have finished the work which thou gavest me to do.

chapters.zh: 父阿，现在求你使我同你享荣耀，就是未有世界以先，我同你所有的荣耀。
chapters.en: And now, O Father, glorify thou me with thine own self with the glory which I had with thee before the world was.

chapters.zh: 你从世上赐给我的人，我已将你的名显明与他们。他们本是你的，你将他们赐给我，他们也遵守了你的道。
chapters.en: I have manifested thy name unto the men which thou gavest me out of the world: thine they were, and thou gavest them me; and they have kept thy word.

chapters.zh: 如今他们知道，凡你所赐给我的，都是从你那里来的；
chapters.en: Now they have known that all things whatsoever thou hast given me are of thee.

chapters.zh: 因为你所赐给我的道，我已经赐给他们，他们也领受了，又确实知道，我是从你出来的，并且信你差了我来。
chapters.en: For I have given unto them the words which thou gavest me; and they have received , and have known surely that I came out from thee, and they have believed that thou didst send me.

chapters.zh: 我为他们祈求，不为世人祈求，却为你所赐给我的人祈求，因他们本是你的。
chapters.en: I pray for them: I pray not for the world, but for them which thou hast given me; for they are thine.

chapters.zh: 凡是我的，都是你的；你的也是我的，并且我因他们得了荣耀。
chapters.en: And all mine are thine, and thine are mine; and I am glorified in them.

chapters.zh: 从今以后，我不在世上，他们却在世上；我往你那里去。圣父阿，求你因你所赐给我的名保守他们，叫他们合而为一像我们一样。
chapters.en: And now I am no more in the world, but these are in the world, and I come to thee. Holy Father, keep through thine own name those whom thou hast given me, that they may be one, as we .

chapters.zh: 我与他们同在的时候，因你所赐给我的名保守了他们，我也护卫了他们；其中除了那灭亡之子，没有一个灭亡的，好叫经上的话得应验。
chapters.en: While I was with them in the world, I kept them in thy name: those that thou gavest me I have kept, and none of them is lost, but the son of perdition; that the scripture might be fulfilled.

chapters.zh: 现在我往你那里去，我还在世上说这话，是叫他们心里充满我的喜乐。
chapters.en: And now come I to thee; and these things I speak in the world, that they might have my joy fulfilled in themselves.

chapters.zh: 我已将你的道赐给他们。世界又恨他们；因为他们不属世界，正如我不属世界一样。
chapters.en: I have given them thy word; and the world hath hated them, because they are not of the world, even as I am not of the world.

chapters.zh: 我不求你叫他们离开世界，只求你保守他们脱离那恶者（或作：脱离罪恶）。
chapters.en: I pray not that thou shouldest take them out of the world, but that thou shouldest keep them from the evil.

chapters.zh: 他们不属世界，正如我不属世界一样。
chapters.en: They are not of the world, even as I am not of the world.

chapters.zh: 求你用真理使他们成圣；你的道就是真理。
chapters.en: Sanctify them through thy truth: thy word is truth.

chapters.zh: 你怎样差我到世上，我也照样差他们到世上。
chapters.en: As thou hast sent me into the world, even so have I also sent them into the world.

chapters.zh: 我为他们的缘故，自己分别为圣，叫他们也因真理成圣。
chapters.en: And for their sakes I sanctify myself, that they also might be sanctified through the truth.

chapters.zh: 我不但为这些人祈求，也为那些因他们的话信我的人祈求，
chapters.en: Neither pray I for these alone, but for them also which shall believe on me through their word;

chapters.zh: 使他们都合而为一。正如你父在我里面，我在你里面，使他们也在我们里面，叫世人可以信你差了我来。
chapters.en: That they all may be one; as thou, Father, in me, and I in thee, that they also may be one in us: that the world may believe that thou hast sent me.

chapters.zh: 你所赐给我的荣耀，我已赐给他们，使他们合而为一，像我们合而为一。
chapters.en: And the glory which thou gavest me I have given them; that they may be one, even as we are one:

chapters.zh: 我在他们里面，你在我里面，使他们完完全全的合而为一，叫世人知道你差了我来，也知道你爱他们如同爱我一样。
chapters.en: I in them, and thou in me, that they may be made perfect in one; and that the world may know that thou hast sent me, and hast loved them, as thou hast loved me.

chapters.zh: 父阿，我在那里，愿你所赐给我的人也同我在那里，叫他们看见你所赐给我的荣耀；因为创立世界以前，你已经爱我了。
chapters.en: Father, I will that they also, whom thou hast given me, be with me where I am; that they may behold my glory, which thou hast given me: for thou lovedst me before the foundation of the world.

chapters.zh: 公义的父阿，世人未曾认识你，我却认识你；这些人也知道你差了我来。
chapters.en: O righteous Father, the world hath not known thee: but I have known thee, and these have known that thou hast sent me.

chapters.zh: 我已将你的名指示他们，还要指示他们，使你所爱我的爱在他们里面，我也在他们里面。
chapters.en: And I have declared unto them thy name, and will declare : that the love wherewith thou hast loved me may be in them, and I in them.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说了这话，就同门徒出去，过了汲沦溪。在那里有一个园子，他和门徒进去了。
chapters.en: When Jesus had spoken these words, he went forth with his disciples over the brook Cedron, where was a garden, into the which he entered, and his disciples.

chapters.zh: 卖耶稣的犹大也知道那地方，因为耶稣和门徒屡次上那里去聚集。
chapters.en: And Judas also, which betrayed him, knew the place: for Jesus ofttimes resorted thither with his disciples.

chapters.zh: 犹大领了一队兵，和祭司长并法利赛人的差役，拿著灯笼、火把、兵器，就来到园里。
chapters.en: Judas then, having received a band and officers from the chief priests and Pharisees, cometh thither with lanterns and torches and weapons.

chapters.zh: 耶稣知道将要临到自己的一切事，就出来对他们说：你们找谁？
chapters.en: Jesus therefore, knowing all things that should come upon him, went forth, and said unto them, Whom seek ye?

chapters.zh: 他们回答说：找拿撒勒人耶稣。耶稣说：我就是。卖他的犹大也同他们站在那里。
chapters.en: They answered him, Jesus of Nazareth. Jesus saith unto them, I am . And Judas also, which betrayed him, stood with them.

chapters.zh: 耶稣一说我就是，他们就退后倒在地上。
chapters.en: As soon then as he had said unto them, I am , they went backward, and fell to the ground.

chapters.zh: 他又问他们说：你们找谁？他们说：找拿撒勒人耶稣。
chapters.en: Then asked he them again, Whom seek ye? And they said, Jesus of Nazareth.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：我已经告诉你们，我就是。你们若找我，就让这些人去罢。
chapters.en: Jesus answered, I have told you that I am : if therefore ye seek me, let these go their way:

chapters.zh: 这要应验耶稣从前的话，说：你所赐给我的人，我没有失落一个。
chapters.en: That the saying might be fulfilled, which he spake, Of them which thou gavest me have I lost none.

chapters.zh: 西门彼得带著一把刀，就拔出来，将大祭司的仆人砍了一刀，削掉他的右耳；那仆人名叫马勒古。
chapters.en: Then Simon Peter having a sword drew it, and smote the high priest's servant, and cut off his right ear. The servant's name was Malchus.

chapters.zh: 耶稣就对彼得说：收刀入鞘罢，我父所给我的那杯，我岂可不喝呢？
chapters.en: Then said Jesus unto Peter, Put up thy sword into the sheath: the cup which my Father hath given me, shall I not drink it?

chapters.zh: 那队兵和千夫长，并犹太人的差役就拿住耶稣，把他捆绑了，
chapters.en: Then the band and the captain and officers of the Jews took Jesus, and bound him,

chapters.zh: 先带到亚那面前，因为亚那是本年作大祭司该亚法的岳父。
chapters.en: And led him away to Annas first; for he was father in law to Caiaphas, which was the high priest that same year.

chapters.zh: 这该亚法就是从前向犹太人发议论说一个人替百姓死是有益的那位。
chapters.en: Now Caiaphas was he, which gave counsel to the Jews, that it was expedient that one man should die for the people.

chapters.zh: 西门彼得跟著耶稣，还有一个门徒跟著。那门徒是大祭司所认识的，他就同耶稣进了大祭司的院子。
chapters.en: And Simon Peter followed Jesus, and another disciple: that disciple was known unto the high priest, and went in with Jesus into the palace of the high priest.

chapters.zh: 彼得却站在门外。大祭司所认识的那个门徒出来，和看门的使女说了一声，就领彼得进去。
chapters.en: But Peter stood at the door without. Then went out that other disciple, which was known unto the high priest, and spake unto her that kept the door, and brought in Peter.

chapters.zh: 那看门的使女对彼得说：你不也是这人的门徒么？他说：我不是。
chapters.en: Then saith the damsel that kept the door unto Peter, Art not thou also of this man's disciples? He saith, I am not.

chapters.zh: 仆人和差役因为天冷，就生了炭火，站在那里烤火；彼得也同他们站著烤火。
chapters.en: And the servants and officers stood there, who had made a fire of coals; for it was cold: and they warmed themselves: and Peter stood with them, and warmed himself.

chapters.zh: 大祭司就以耶稣的门徒和他的教训盘问他。
chapters.en: The high priest then asked Jesus of his disciples, and of his doctrine.

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：我从来是明明的对世人说话。我常在会堂和殿里，就是犹太人聚集的地方教训人；我在暗地里并没有说甚么。
chapters.en: Jesus answered him, I spake openly to the world; I ever taught in the synagogue, and in the temple, whither the Jews always resort; and in secret have I said nothing.

chapters.zh: 你为甚么问我呢？可以问那听见的人，我对他们说的是甚么；我所说的，他们都知道。
chapters.en: Why askest thou me? ask them which heard me, what I have said unto them: behold, they know what I said.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说了这话，旁边站著的一个差役用手掌打他，说：你这样回答大祭司么？
chapters.en: And when he had thus spoken, one of the officers which stood by struck Jesus with the palm of his hand, saying, Answerest thou the high priest so?

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：我若说的不是，你可以指证那不是；我若说的是，你为甚么打我呢？
chapters.en: Jesus answered him, If I have spoken evil, bear witness of the evil: but if well, why smitest thou me?

chapters.zh: 亚那就把耶稣解到大祭司该亚法那里，仍是捆著解去的。
chapters.en: Now Annas had sent him bound unto Caiaphas the high priest.

chapters.zh: 西门彼得正站著烤火，有人对他说：你不也是他的门徒么？彼得不承认，说：我不是。
chapters.en: And Simon Peter stood and warmed himself. They said therefore unto him, Art not thou also of his disciples? He denied , and said, I am not.

chapters.zh: 有大祭司的一个仆人，是彼得削掉耳朵那人的亲属，说：我不是看见你同他在园子里么？
chapters.en: One of the servants of the high priest, being kinsman whose ear Peter cut off, saith, Did not I see thee in the garden with him?

chapters.zh: 彼得又不承认。立时鸡就叫了。
chapters.en: Peter then denied again: and immediately the cock crew.

chapters.zh: 众人将耶稣从该亚法那里往衙门内解去，那时天还早。他们自己却不进衙门，恐怕染了污秽，不能吃逾越节的筵席。
chapters.en: Then led they Jesus from Caiaphas unto the hall of judgment: and it was early; and they themselves went not into the judgment hall, lest they should be defiled; but that they might eat the passover.

chapters.zh: 彼拉多就出来，到他们那里，说：你们告这人是为甚么事呢？
chapters.en: Pilate then went out unto them, and said, What accusation bring ye against this man?

chapters.zh: 他们回答说：这人若不是作恶的，我们就不把他交给你。
chapters.en: They answered and said unto him, If he were not a malefactor, we would not have delivered him up unto thee.

chapters.zh: 彼拉多说：你们自己带他去，按著你们的律法审问他罢。犹太人说：我们没有杀人的权柄。
chapters.en: Then said Pilate unto them, Take ye him, and judge him according to your law. The Jews therefore said unto him, It is not lawful for us to put any man to death:

chapters.zh: 这要应验耶稣所说自己将要怎样死的话了。
chapters.en: That the saying of Jesus might be fulfilled, which he spake, signifying what death he should die.

chapters.zh: 彼拉多又进了衙门，叫耶稣来，对他说：你是犹太人的王么？
chapters.en: Then Pilate entered into the judgment hall again, and called Jesus, and said unto him, Art thou the King of the Jews?

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：这话是你自己说的，还是别人论我对你说的呢？
chapters.en: Jesus answered him, Sayest thou this thing of thyself, or did others tell it thee of me?

chapters.zh: 彼拉多说：我岂是犹太人呢？你本国的人和祭司长把你交给我。你做了甚么事呢？
chapters.en: Pilate answered, Am I a Jew? Thine own nation and the chief priests have delivered thee unto me: what hast thou done?

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：我的国不属这世界；我的国若属这世界，我的臣仆必要争战，使我不至于被交给犹太人。只是我的国不属这世界。
chapters.en: Jesus answered, My kingdom is not of this world: if my kingdom were of this world, then would my servants fight, that I should not be delivered to the Jews: but now is my kingdom not from hence.

chapters.zh: 彼拉多就对他说：这样，你是王么？耶稣回答说：你说我是王。我为此而生，也为此来到世间，特为给真理作见证。凡属真理的人就听我的话。
chapters.en: Pilate therefore said unto him, Art thou a king then? Jesus answered, Thou sayest that I am a king. To this end was I born, and for this cause came I into the world, that I should bear witness unto the truth. Every one that is of the truth heareth my voice.

chapters.zh: 彼拉多说：真理是甚么呢？说了这话，又出来到犹太人那里，对他们说：我查不出他有甚么罪来。
chapters.en: Pilate saith unto him, What is truth? And when he had said this, he went out again unto the Jews, and saith unto them, I find in him no fault .

chapters.zh: 但你们有个规矩，在逾越节要我给你们释放一个人，你们要我给你们释放犹太人的王么？
chapters.en: But ye have a custom, that I should release unto you one at the passover: will ye therefore that I release unto you the King of the Jews?

chapters.zh: 他们又喊著说：不要这人，要巴拉巴！这巴拉巴是个强盗。
chapters.en: Then cried they all again, saying, Not this man, but Barabbas. Now Barabbas was a robber.

chapters.zh: 当下彼拉多将耶稣鞭打了。
chapters.en: Then Pilate therefore took Jesus, and scourged .

chapters.zh: 兵丁用荆棘编作冠冕戴在他头上，给他穿上紫袍，
chapters.en: And the soldiers platted a crown of thorns, and put on his head, and they put on him a purple robe,

chapters.zh: 又挨近他，说：恭喜，犹太人的王阿！他们就用手掌打他。
chapters.en: And said, Hail, King of the Jews! and they smote him with their hands.

chapters.zh: 彼拉多又出来对众人说：我带他出来见你们，叫你们知道我查不出他有甚么罪来。
chapters.en: Pilate therefore went forth again, and saith unto them, Behold, I bring him forth to you, that ye may know that I find no fault in him.

chapters.zh: 耶稣出来，戴著荆棘冠冕，穿著紫袍。彼拉多对他们说：你们看这个人！
chapters.en: Then came Jesus forth, wearing the crown of thorns, and the purple robe. And saith unto them, Behold the man!

chapters.zh: 祭司长和差役看见他，就喊著说：钉他十字架！钉他十字架！彼拉多说：你们自己把他钉十字架罢！我查不出他有甚么罪来。
chapters.en: When the chief priests therefore and officers saw him, they cried out, saying, Crucify , crucify . Pilate saith unto them, Take ye him, and crucify : for I find no fault in him.

chapters.zh: 犹太人回答说：我们有律法，按那律法，他是该死的，因他以自己为神的儿子。
chapters.en: The Jews answered him, We have a law, and by our law he ought to die, because he made himself the Son of God.

chapters.zh: 彼拉多听见这话，越发害怕，
chapters.en: When Pilate therefore heard that saying, he was the more afraid;

chapters.zh: 又进衙门，对耶稣说：你是那里来的？耶稣却不回答。
chapters.en: And went again into the judgment hall, and saith unto Jesus, Whence art thou? But Jesus gave him no answer.

chapters.zh: 彼拉多说：你不对我说话么？你岂不知我有权柄释放你，也有权柄把你钉十字架么？
chapters.en: Then saith Pilate unto him, Speakest thou not unto me? knowest thou not that I have power to crucify thee, and have power to release thee?

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：若不是从上头赐给你的，你就毫无权柄办我。所以，把我交给你的那人罪更重了。
chapters.en: Jesus answered, Thou couldest have no power against me, except it were given thee from above: therefore he that delivered me unto thee hath the greater sin.

chapters.zh: 从此，彼拉多想要释放耶稣，无奈犹太人喊著说：你若释放这个人，就不是该撒的忠臣（原文作朋友）。凡以自己为王的，就是背叛该撒了。
chapters.en: And from thenceforth Pilate sought to release him: but the Jews cried out, saying, If thou let this man go, thou art not Caesar's friend: whosoever maketh himself a king speaketh against Caesar.

chapters.zh: 彼拉多听见这话，就带耶稣出来，到了一个地方，名叫铺华石处，希伯来话叫厄巴大，就在那里坐堂。
chapters.en: When Pilate therefore heard that saying, he brought Jesus forth, and sat down in the judgment seat in a place that is called the Pavement, but in the Hebrew, Gabbatha.

chapters.zh: 那日是预备逾越节的日子，约有午正。彼拉多对犹太人说：看哪，这是你们的王！
chapters.en: And it was the preparation of the passover, and about the sixth hour: and he saith unto the Jews, Behold your King!

chapters.zh: 他们喊著说：除掉他！除掉他！钉他在十字架上！彼拉多说：我可以把你们的王钉十字架么？祭司长回答说：除了该撒，我们没有王。
chapters.en: But they cried out, Away with , away with , crucify him. Pilate saith unto them, Shall I crucify your King? The chief priests answered, We have no king but Caesar.

chapters.zh: 于是彼拉多将耶稣交给他们去钉十字架。
chapters.en: Then delivered he him therefore unto them to be crucified. And they took Jesus, and led away.

chapters.zh: 他们就把耶稣带了去。耶稣背著自己的十字架出来，到了一个地方，名叫髑髅地，希伯来话叫各各他。
chapters.en: And he bearing his cross went forth into a place called of a skull, which is called in the Hebrew Golgotha:

chapters.zh: 他们就在那里钉他在十字架上，还有两个人和他一同钉著，一边一个，耶稣在中间。
chapters.en: Where they crucified him, and two other with him, on either side one, and Jesus in the midst.

chapters.zh: 彼拉多又用牌子写了一个名号，安在十字架上，写的是：犹太人的王，拿撒勒人耶稣。
chapters.en: And Pilate wrote a title, and put on the cross. And the writing was, JESUS OF NAZARETH THE KING OF THE JEWS.

chapters.zh: 有许多犹太人念这名号；因为耶稣被钉十字架的地方与城相近，并且是用希伯来、罗马、希利尼三样文字写的。
chapters.en: This title then read many of the Jews: for the place where Jesus was crucified was nigh to the city: and it was written in Hebrew, Greek, Latin.

chapters.zh: 犹太人的祭司长就对彼拉多说：不要写犹太人的王，要写他自己说：我是犹太人的王。
chapters.en: Then said the chief priests of the Jews to Pilate, Write not, The King of the Jews; but that he said, I am King of the Jews.

chapters.zh: 彼拉多说：我所写的，我已经写上了。
chapters.en: Pilate answered, What I have written I have written.

chapters.zh: 兵丁既然将耶稣钉在十字架上，就拿他的衣服分为四分，每兵一分；又拿他的里衣，这件里衣原来没有缝儿，是上下一片织成的。
chapters.en: Then the soldiers, when they had crucified Jesus, took his garments, and made four parts, to every soldier a part; and also coat: now the coat was without seam, woven from the top throughout.

chapters.zh: 他们就彼此说：我们不要撕开，只要拈阄，看谁得著。这要应验经上的话说：他们分了我的外衣，为我的里衣拈阄。兵丁果然做了这事。
chapters.en: They said therefore among themselves, Let us not rend it, but cast lots for it, whose it shall be: that the scripture might be fulfilled, which saith, They parted my raiment among them, and for my vesture they did cast lots. These things therefore the soldiers did.

chapters.zh: 站在耶稣十字架旁边的，有他母亲与他母亲的姊妹，并革罗罢的妻子马利亚，和抹大拉的马利亚。
chapters.en: Now there stood by the cross of Jesus his mother, and his mother's sister, Mary the of Cleophas, and Mary Magdalene.

chapters.zh: 耶稣见母亲和他所爱的那门徒站在旁边，就对他母亲说：母亲（原文作妇人），看，你的儿子！
chapters.en: When Jesus therefore saw his mother, and the disciple standing by, whom he loved, he saith unto his mother, Woman, behold thy son!

chapters.zh: 又对那门徒说：看，你的母亲！从此，那门徒就接他到自己家里去了。
chapters.en: Then saith he to the disciple, Behold thy mother! And from that hour that disciple took her unto his own .

chapters.zh: 这事以后，耶稣知道各样的事已经成了，为要使经上的话应验，就说：我渴了。
chapters.en: After this, Jesus knowing that all things were now accomplished, that the scripture might be fulfilled, saith, I thirst.

chapters.zh: 有一个器皿盛满了醋，放在那里；他们就拿海绒蘸满了醋，绑在牛膝草上，送到他口。
chapters.en: Now there was set a vessel full of vinegar: and they filled a spunge with vinegar, and put upon hyssop, and put to his mouth.

chapters.zh: 耶稣尝（原文作受）了那醋，就说：成了！便低下头，将灵魂交付神了。
chapters.en: When Jesus therefore had received the vinegar, he said, It is finished: and he bowed his head, and gave up the ghost.

chapters.zh: 犹太人因这日是预备日，又因那安息日是个大日，就求彼拉多叫人打断他们的腿，把他们拿去，免得尸首当安息日留在十字架上。
chapters.en: The Jews therefore, because it was the preparation, that the bodies should not remain upon the cross on the sabbath day, (for that sabbath day was an high day,) besought Pilate that their legs might be broken, and they might be taken away.

chapters.zh: 于是兵丁来，把头一个人的腿，并与耶稣同钉第二个人的腿，都打断了。
chapters.en: Then came the soldiers, and brake the legs of the first, and of the other which was crucified with him.

chapters.zh: 只是来到耶稣那里，见他已经死了，就不打断他的腿。
chapters.en: But when they came to Jesus, and saw that he was dead already, they brake not his legs:

chapters.zh: 惟有一个兵拿枪扎他的肋旁，随即有血和水流出来。
chapters.en: But one of the soldiers with a spear pierced his side, and forthwith came there out blood and water.

chapters.zh: 看见这事的那人就作见证 ─ 他的见证也是真的，并且他知道自己所说的是真的 ─ 叫你们也可以信。
chapters.en: And he that saw bare record, and his record is true: and he knoweth that he saith true, that ye might believe.

chapters.zh: 这些事成了，为要应验经上的话说：他的骨头一根也不可折断。
chapters.en: For these things were done, that the scripture should be fulfilled, A bone of him shall not be broken.

chapters.zh: 经上又有一句说：他们要仰望自己所扎的人。
chapters.en: And again another scripture saith, They shall look on him whom they pierced.

chapters.zh: 这些事以后，有亚利马太人约瑟，是耶稣的门徒，只因怕犹太人，就暗暗的作门徒。他来求彼拉多，要把耶稣的身体领去。彼拉多允准，他就把耶稣的身体领去了。
chapters.en: And after this Joseph of Arimathaea, being a disciple of Jesus, but secretly for fear of the Jews, besought Pilate that he might take away the body of Jesus: and Pilate gave leave. He came therefore, and took the body of Jesus.

chapters.zh: 又有尼哥底母，就是先前夜里去见耶稣的，带著没药和沉香约有一百斤前来。
chapters.en: And there came also Nicodemus, which at the first came to Jesus by night, and brought a mixture of myrrh and aloes, about an hundred pound .

chapters.zh: 他们就照犹太人殡葬的规矩，把耶稣的身体用细麻布加上香料裹好了。
chapters.en: Then took they the body of Jesus, and wound it in linen clothes with the spices, as the manner of the Jews is to bury.

chapters.zh: 在耶稣钉十字架的地方有一个园子，园子里有一座新坟墓，是从来没有葬过人的。
chapters.en: Now in the place where he was crucified there was a garden; and in the garden a new sepulchre, wherein was never man yet laid.

chapters.zh: 只因是犹太人的预备日，又因那坟墓近，他们就把耶稣安放在那里。
chapters.en: There laid they Jesus therefore because of the Jews' preparation ; for the sepulchre was nigh at hand.

chapters.zh: 七日的第一日清早，天还黑的时候，抹大拉的马利亚来到坟墓那里，看见石头从坟墓挪开了，
chapters.en: The first of the week cometh Mary Magdalene early, when it was yet dark, unto the sepulchre, and seeth the stone taken away from the sepulchre.

chapters.zh: 就跑来见西门彼得和耶稣所爱的那个门徒，对他们说：有人把主从坟墓里挪了去，我们不知道放在那里。
chapters.en: Then she runneth, and cometh to Simon Peter, and to the other disciple, whom Jesus loved, and saith unto them, They have taken away the Lord out of the sepulchre, and we know not where they have laid him.

chapters.zh: 彼得和那门徒就出来，往坟墓那里去。
chapters.en: Peter therefore went forth, and that other disciple, and came to the sepulchre.

chapters.zh: 两个人同跑，那门徒比彼得跑的更快，先到了坟墓，
chapters.en: So they ran both together: and the other disciple did outrun Peter, and came first to the sepulchre.

chapters.zh: 低头往里看，就见细麻布还放在那里，只是没有进去。
chapters.en: And he stooping down, , saw the linen clothes lying; yet went he not in.

chapters.zh: 西门彼得随后也到了，进坟墓里去，就看见细麻布还放在那里，
chapters.en: Then cometh Simon Peter following him, and went into the sepulchre, and seeth the linen clothes lie,

chapters.zh: 又看见耶稣的裹头巾没有和细麻布放在一处，是另在一处卷著。
chapters.en: And the napkin, that was about his head, not lying with the linen clothes, but wrapped together in a place by itself.

chapters.zh: 先到坟墓的那门徒也进去，看见就信了。
chapters.en: Then went in also that other disciple, which came first to the sepulchre, and he saw, and believed.

chapters.zh: 因为他们还不明白圣经的意思，就是耶稣必要从死里复活。
chapters.en: For as yet they knew not the scripture, that he must rise again from the dead.

chapters.zh: 于是两个门徒回自己的住处去了。
chapters.en: Then the disciples went away again unto their own home.

chapters.zh: 马利亚却站在坟墓外面哭。哭的时候，低头往坟墓里看，
chapters.en: But Mary stood without at the sepulchre weeping: and as she wept, she stooped down, into the sepulchre,

chapters.zh: 就见两个天使，穿著白衣，在安放耶稣身体的地方坐著，一个在头，一个在脚。
chapters.en: And seeth two angels in white sitting, the one at the head, and the other at the feet, where the body of Jesus had lain.

chapters.zh: 天使对他说：妇人，你为甚么哭？他说：因为有人把我主挪了去，我不知道放在那里。
chapters.en: And they say unto her, Woman, why weepest thou? She saith unto them, Because they have taken away my Lord, and I know not where they have laid him.

chapters.zh: 说了这话，就转过身来，看见耶稣站在那里，却不知道是耶稣。
chapters.en: And when she had thus said, she turned herself back, and saw Jesus standing, and knew not that it was Jesus.

chapters.zh: 耶稣问他说：妇人，为甚么哭？你找谁呢？马利亚以为是看园的，就对他说：先生，若是你把他移了去，请告诉我，你把他放在那里，我便去取他。
chapters.en: Jesus saith unto her, Woman, why weepest thou? whom seekest thou? She, supposing him to be the gardener, saith unto him, Sir, if thou have borne him hence, tell me where thou hast laid him, and I will take him away.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：马利亚。马利亚就转过来，用希伯来话对他说：拉波尼！（拉波尼就是夫子的意思。）
chapters.en: Jesus saith unto her, Mary. She turned herself, and saith unto him, Rabboni; which is to say, Master.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：不要摸我，因我还没有升上去见我的父。你往我弟兄那里去，告诉他们说，我要升上去见我的父，也是你们的父，见我的神，也是你们的神。
chapters.en: Jesus saith unto her, Touch me not; for I am not yet ascended to my Father: but go to my brethren, and say unto them, I ascend unto my Father, and your Father; and my God, and your God.

chapters.zh: 抹大拉的马利亚就去告诉门徒说：我已经看见了主。他又将主对他说的这话告诉他们。
chapters.en: Mary Magdalene came and told the disciples that she had seen the Lord, and he had spoken these things unto her.

chapters.zh: 那日（就是七日的第一日）晚上，门徒所在的地方，因怕犹太人，门都关了。耶稣来，站在当中，对他们说：愿你们平安！
chapters.en: Then the same day at evening, being the first of the week, when the doors were shut where the disciples were assembled for fear of the Jews, came Jesus and stood in the midst, and saith unto them, Peace unto you.

chapters.zh: 说了这话，就把手和肋旁指给他们看。门徒看见主，就喜乐了。
chapters.en: And when he had so said, he shewed unto them hands and his side. Then were the disciples glad, when they saw the Lord.

chapters.zh: 耶稣又对他们说：愿你们平安！父怎样差遣了我，我也照样差遣你们。
chapters.en: Then said Jesus to them again, Peace unto you: as Father hath sent me, even so send I you.

chapters.zh: 说了这话，就向他们吹一口气，说：你们受圣灵！
chapters.en: And when he had said this, he breathed on , and saith unto them, Receive ye the Holy Ghost:

chapters.zh: 你们赦免谁的罪，谁的罪就赦免了；你们留下谁的罪，谁的罪就留下了。
chapters.en: Whose soever sins ye remit, they are remitted unto them; whose soever ye retain, they are retained.

chapters.zh: 那十二个门徒中，有称为低土马的多马；耶稣来的时候，他没有和他们同在。
chapters.en: But Thomas, one of the twelve, called Didymus, was not with them when Jesus came.

chapters.zh: 那些门徒就对他说：我们已经看见主了。多马却说：我非看见他手上的钉痕，用指头探入那钉痕，又用手探入他的肋旁，我总不信。
chapters.en: The other disciples therefore said unto him, We have seen the Lord. But he said unto them, Except I shall see in his hands the print of the nails, and put my finger into the print of the nails, and thrust my hand into his side, I will not believe.

chapters.zh: 过了八日，门徒又在屋里，多马也和他们同在，门都关了。耶稣来，站在当中说：愿你们平安！
chapters.en: And after eight days again his disciples were within, and Thomas with them: came Jesus, the doors being shut, and stood in the midst, and said, Peace unto you.

chapters.zh: 就对多马说：伸过你的指头来，摸（原文是看）我的手；伸出你的手来，探入我的肋旁。不要疑惑，总要信。
chapters.en: Then saith he to Thomas, Reach hither thy finger, and behold my hands; and reach hither thy hand, and thrust into my side: and be not faithless, but believing.

chapters.zh: 多马说：我的主！我的神！
chapters.en: And Thomas answered and said unto him, My Lord and my God.

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他说：你因看见了我才信；那没有看见就信的有福了。
chapters.en: Jesus saith unto him, Thomas, because thou hast seen me, thou hast believed: blessed they that have not seen, and have believed.

chapters.zh: 耶稣在门徒面前另外行了许多神迹，没有记在这书上。
chapters.en: And many other signs truly did Jesus in the presence of his disciples, which are not written in this book:

chapters.zh: 但记这些事要叫你们信耶稣是基督，是神的儿子，并且叫你们信了他，就可以因他的名得生命。
chapters.en: But these are written, that ye might believe that Jesus is the Christ, the Son of God; and that believing ye might have life through his name.

chapters.zh: 这些事以后，耶稣在提比哩亚海边又向门徒显现。他怎样显现记在下面：
chapters.en: After these things Jesus shewed himself again to the disciples at the sea of Tiberias; and on this wise shewed he .

chapters.zh: 有西门彼得和称为低土马的多马，并加利利的迦拿人拿但业，还有西庇太的两个儿子，又有两个门徒，都在一处。
chapters.en: There were together Simon Peter, and Thomas called Didymus, and Nathanael of Cana in Galilee, and the of Zebedee, and two other of his disciples.

chapters.zh: 西门彼得对他们说：我打鱼去。他们说：我们也和你同去。他们就出去，上了船；那一夜并没有打著甚么。
chapters.en: Simon Peter saith unto them, I go a fishing. They say unto him, We also go with thee. They went forth, and entered into a ship immediately; and that night they caught nothing.

chapters.zh: 天将亮的时候，耶稣站在岸上，门徒却不知道是耶稣。
chapters.en: But when the morning was now come, Jesus stood on the shore: but the disciples knew not that it was Jesus.

chapters.zh: 耶稣就对他们说：小子！你们有吃的没有？他们回答说：没有。
chapters.en: Then Jesus saith unto them, Children, have ye any meat? They answered him, No.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：你们把网撒在船的右边，就必得著。他们便撒下网去，竟拉不上来了，因为鱼甚多。
chapters.en: And he said unto them, Cast the net on the right side of the ship, and ye shall find. They cast therefore, and now they were not able to draw it for the multitude of fishes.

chapters.zh: 耶稣所爱的那门徒对彼得说：是主！那时西门彼得赤著身子，一听见是主，就束上一件外衣，跳在海里。
chapters.en: Therefore that disciple whom Jesus loved saith unto Peter, It is the Lord. Now when Simon Peter heard that it was the Lord, he girt fisher's coat , (for he was naked,) and did cast himself into the sea.

chapters.zh: 其余的门徒离岸不远，约有二百肘（古代以肘为尺，一肘约有今时尺半），就在小船上把那网鱼拉过来。
chapters.en: And the other disciples came in a little ship; (for they were not far from land, but as it were two hundred cubits,) dragging the net with fishes.

chapters.zh: 他们上了岸，就看见那里有炭火，上面有鱼，又有饼。
chapters.en: As soon then as they were come to land, they saw a fire of coals there, and fish laid thereon, and bread.

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他们说：把刚才打的鱼拿几条来。
chapters.en: Jesus saith unto them, Bring of the fish which ye have now caught.

chapters.zh: 西门彼得就去（或作：上船），把网拉到岸上。那网满了大鱼，共一百五十三条；鱼虽这样多，网却没有破。
chapters.en: Simon Peter went up, and drew the net to land full of great fishes, an hundred and fifty and three: and for all there were so many, yet was not the net broken.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：你们来吃早饭。门徒中没有一个敢问他：你是谁？因为知道是主。
chapters.en: Jesus saith unto them, Come dine. And none of the disciples durst ask him, Who art thou? knowing that it was the Lord.

chapters.zh: 耶稣就来拿饼和鱼给他们。
chapters.en: Jesus then cometh, and taketh bread, and giveth them, and fish likewise.

chapters.zh: 耶稣从死里复活以后，向门徒显现，这是第三次。
chapters.en: This is now the third time that Jesus shewed himself to his disciples, after that he was risen from the dead.

chapters.zh: 他们吃完了早饭，耶稣对西门彼得说：约翰（在太16：17称约拿）的儿子西门，你爱我比这些更深么？彼得说：主阿，是的，你知道我爱你。耶稣对他说：你喂养我的小羊。
chapters.en: So when they had dined, Jesus saith to Simon Peter, Simon, of Jonas, lovest thou me more than these? He saith unto him, Yea, Lord; thou knowest that I love thee. He saith unto him, Feed my lambs.

chapters.zh: 耶稣第二次又对他说：约翰的儿子西门，你爱我么？彼得说：主阿，是的，你知道我爱你。耶稣说：你牧养我的羊。
chapters.en: He saith to him again the second time, Simon, of Jonas, lovest thou me? He saith unto him, Yea, Lord; thou knowest that I love thee. He saith unto him, Feed my sheep.

chapters.zh: 第三次对他说：约翰的儿子西门 ﹐ 你爱我么？彼得因为耶稣第三次对他说你爱我么，就忧愁，对耶稣说：主阿，你是无所不知的；你知道我爱你。耶稣说：你喂养我的羊。
chapters.en: He saith unto him the third time, Simon, of Jonas, lovest thou me? Peter was grieved because he said unto him the third time, Lovest thou me? And he said unto him, Lord, thou knowest all things; thou knowest that I love thee. Jesus saith unto him, Feed my sheep.

chapters.zh: 我实实在在的告诉你，你年少的时候，自己束上带子，随意往来；但年老的时候，你要伸出手来，别人要把你束上，带你到不愿意去的地方。
chapters.en: Verily, verily, I say unto thee, When thou wast young, thou girdedst thyself, and walkedst whither thou wouldest: but when thou shalt be old, thou shalt stretch forth thy hands, and another shall gird thee, and carry whither thou wouldest not.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说这话是指著彼得要怎样死，荣耀神。说了这话，就对他说：你跟从我罢！
chapters.en: This spake he, signifying by what death he should glorify God. And when he had spoken this, he saith unto him, Follow me.

chapters.zh: 彼得转过来，看见耶稣所爱的那门徒跟著，就是在晚饭的时候，靠著耶稣胸膛说：主阿，卖你的是谁？的那门徒。
chapters.en: Then Peter, turning about, seeth the disciple whom Jesus loved following; which also leaned on his breast at supper, and said, Lord, which is he that betrayeth thee?

chapters.zh: 彼得看见他，就问耶稣说：主阿，这人将来如何？
chapters.en: Peter seeing him saith to Jesus, Lord, and what this man ?

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他说：我若要他等到我来的时候，与你何干？你跟从我罢！
chapters.en: Jesus saith unto him, If I will that he tarry till I come, what to thee? follow thou me.

chapters.zh: 于是这话传在弟兄中间，说那门徒不死。其实，耶稣不是说他不死，乃是说：我若要他等到我来的时候，与你何干？
chapters.en: Then went this saying abroad among the brethren, that that disciple should not die: yet Jesus said not unto him, He shall not die; but, If I will that he tarry till I come, what to thee?

chapters.zh: 为这些事作见证，并且记载这些事的就是这门徒；我们也知道他的见证是真的。
chapters.en: This is the disciple which testifieth of these things, and wrote these things: and we know that his testimony is true.

chapters.zh: 耶稣所行的事还有许多，若是一一的都写出来，我想，所写的书就是世界也容不下了。
chapters.en: And there are also many other things which Jesus did, the which, if they should be written every one, I suppose that even the world itself could not contain the books that should be written. Amen.
